response.justification: Bogdan is a highly experienced software engineer with over 15 years of industry experience, including recent Staff and Senior roles utilizing TypeScript, Node.js, React, and AWS. He perfectly aligns with the core stack requirements and brings a robust background in TDD, cloud infrastructure, and the specifically requested AI agent development. His degree from a top-tier university (ETH Zürich) and demonstrated leadership in software craftsmanship make him an exceptionally strong candidate for this Senior Fullstack role.
strengths: Deep expertise in the core stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React) alongside cloud and containerization tools (AWS, Docker, Kubernetes).
Direct, recent experience developing AI-agent infrastructure and Model Context Protocol (MCP) tools, fulfilling a niche requirement.
Exceptional software testing background, including TDD advocacy, building test runners, and leading technical workshops.
concerns: Lacks explicit mention of Nest.js and Vitest, though highly experienced in Node.js and testing methodologies generally.
Currently holds a Staff Engineer title and operates as a Founder, which may make a Mid-Senior IC role less appealing to him.
Python and Kotlin are not explicitly listed in his recent tech stack, despite being requested in the secondary requirements.
